context: Even after rights clearing, items may carry TK Labels, sensitive ethnographic content, or living-person personal data. The cultural-sensitivity screen specified in screen-001 must run over every cleared item before fan-out. Flagged items are held for review and not fanned. Depends on data-001 and screen-001. See PLAN.md (M1 exit criterion e).
acceptanceCriteria: Every item in the M1 cleared corpus is passed through the screen defined in screen-001.
Items triggering TK-label, sensitive-ethnographic, or living-person signals are flagged and held in a separate queue, not fanned out.
Each held item's flag reason is recorded.
The screen-completion report documents: total items screened, number flagged per category, and disposition of flagged items.
The screen is run by or reviewed by a person with appropriate cultural/privacy competence.
No flagged item is fanned out without explicit reviewer sign-off.
output: A committed cultural-sensitivity screen-completion report for the M1 corpus, with flagged items held.
title: Run cultural-sensitivity / privacy screen over the corpus; hold flagged items
objective: Run the cultural-sensitivity and privacy screen (per screen-001 spec) over all items in the M1 cleared corpus, flag items carrying TK Labels, sensitive content, or living-person data, hold them for reviewer sign-off, and produce a screen-completion report.
